CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: Disease(bladderCancer)  
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: Disease(bladderCancer) & BloodCancer(bladderCancer)

CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: Leukemia(bladderCancer) & -BloodCancer(bladderCancer)
